text: I feel a gentle but persistent hum of anticipation as I stand here. The sleek modernity of glass, lights, and polished surfaces outside contrasts sharply with the vibrant colors and concepts of the R+D exhibit inside. It is as though I am on the threshold between the methodical calm of a laboratory and the lively uncertainty of an idea’s birth. Here, surrounded by words and relics of human ingenuity, I feel acutely aware of my small place in this vast continuum of curiosity and innovation—a witness to the ceaseless dance between reflection and progress.
